mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart (user_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.name as productName, p.price as price, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.farmer_id as farmerId FROM t_cart c LEFT JOIN t_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
